name: Ubiquiti LTU Long-Range
title: Ubiquiti LTU Long-Range
short_description: 5 GHz PtMP Radio with an integrated antenna, proprietary Ubiquiti LTU processor, flexible bandwidth 10/20/30/40/50 MHz, range up to 30km, gain 26 dBi
description: 5 GHz PtMP Radio with an integrated antenna, proprietary Ubiquiti LTU processor, flexible bandwidth 10/20/30/40/50 MHz, range up to 30km, gain 26 dBi

detailed_description.heading: LTU Long-Range Overview
detailed_description.text: The LTU Long-Range stands as a pivotal component in Ubiquiti's line of advanced wireless network solutions. This product is engineered to deliver superior broadband connectivity over extended distances, incorporating Ubiquiti's proprietary LTU technology that significantly surpasses traditional Wi-Fi and fixed wireless standards in terms of performance and reliability.

detailed_description.heading: Compatibility
detailed_description.text: Compatible with LTU devices only. LTU Long-Range functions in a PtMP environment with the LTU-Rocket as the BaseStation.

detailed_description.heading: 5 GHz Performance
detailed_description.text: The device operates within the 5 GHz frequency band and with it's bandwidth of 900+ Mbps, becomes a strategic choice that minimizes interference from other wireless devices, ensuring a cleaner and more reliable signal. Furthermore, the LTU Long-Range is equipped with a specialized antenna that boasts significant gain, enhancing its ability to maintain strong and stable connections even over vast distances (30+ km). This combination of advanced technology and strategic design choices results in a product capable of delivering unparalleled performance in challenging environments.

detailed_description.heading: Security Features
detailed_description.text: Security is a cornerstone of the LTU Long-Range's design, featuring advanced encryption and authentication protocols to safeguard the network against unauthorized access and ensure the confidentiality and integrity of data transmissions. These security measures are essential for maintaining a secure network environment, particularly in applications where sensitive information is being transmitted.

detailed_description.heading: Network Management
detailed_description.text: In terms of network management, the LTU Long-Range integrates seamlessly with Ubiquiti's Network Management System (UNMS), offering administrators a comprehensive toolset for device configuration, monitoring, and management. This platform provides an intuitive, user-friendly interface that allows for real-time adjustments and optimizations, ensuring that the network operates at peak efficiency. Through UNMS, administrators can easily manage frequency allocations, adjust power settings, and monitor network health, among other critical functions, enabling precise control over the wireless infrastructure.

detailed_description.heading: Applications for ISPs
detailed_description.text: The versatility of the LTU Long-Range makes it suitable for a wide array of application scenarios. It is particularly valuable for internet service providers (ISPs) looking to extend broadband services to rural or underserved areas, where traditional cable or fiber infrastructure is impractical or too costly to deploy. Additionally, it finds use in establishing long-distance point-to-point (PtP) links for connecting remote sites or facilities, such as linking a remote office to the main corporate network or providing connectivity between two distant campus buildings.

detailed_description.heading: Large-Scale and Critical Networks
detailed_description.text: Furthermore, the LTU Long-Range can serve as the backbone for large-scale wireless networks, supporting applications ranging from video surveillance systems requiring high-bandwidth backhaul to large outdoor event broadcasting where reliable, high-speed internet access is crucial. Its robust performance also makes it an ideal choice for critical communications infrastructure, such as emergency response networks that demand reliable and secure connectivity under all conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Summary
detailed_description.text: In summary, the LTU Long-Range is a high-performance wireless broadband device that leverages Ubiquiti's proprietary LTU technology to provide superior long-distance connectivity. Its combination of high-order modulation, high-gain antenna, streamlined deployment, comprehensive network management capabilities, and robust security features make it an exceptional choice for a broad spectrum of applications, from rural broadband access to critical communications infrastructure.
